label: WF0.2 — Meet Sarah Chen
title: Sarah Chen
subtitle: Senior Industry Marketing Manager — AI Marketing

cards.label: PERSPECTIVE
cards.text: Industry marketing strategy — translating complex AI into credible market narratives

cards.label: GOAL
cards.text: Redesign job hunt strategy and materials creation with AI collaboration

body.callout: Your scenario will be different. Sarah's role, industry, and goals are the defaults for this sandbox. You'll bring your own context to the workflows and make them your own.

levels.label: LEVEL 1
levels.title: Time Savings
levels.text: Build reusable tools, documented processes, and prompts you can return to again and again. Each use saves time you would have spent starting from scratch.

levels.label: LEVEL 2
levels.title: Personal Impact
levels.text: Reinvest reclaimed time in what matters most — your career, relationships, health, or whatever you're building. The return compounds over time.

body.footer: From 100 minutes per month, to 100 minutes per week, to 100 minutes per day.

markers.title: Step to Complete
markers.desc: A step to do — follow the instruction before moving on.

markers.title: Prompt to Copy
markers.desc: Copy and paste this prompt into your AI tool.

markers.title: Save Point
markers.desc: Capture your output — save it to a document or the results tab.

markers.title: Try This (Extension)
markers.desc: Optional extension to deepen your learning.

markers.title: Helpful Context
markers.desc: Background information on why a step matters.

markers.title: Important Reminder
markers.desc: Don't skip this — common mistakes or critical notes.

label: WF0.7 — Closing: Module 1
title: Module 1: Learning to Communicate
subtitle: Build your personal perspective brief — the foundation for everything that follows.
